_comment: MCP server configuration for target projects. Agents use these servers for external data access. Only configure servers you have access to.

analytics._comment: Product analytics (usage data, funnels, retention). Used by: discovery agent

support._comment: Customer support tickets and feedback. Used by: discovery agent

crm._comment: CRM data (customer profiles, deal context). Used by: discovery agent

documents._comment: Internal documentation and wikis. Used by: discovery agent, reporter agent

project-management._comment: Issue tracking and roadmap. Used by: reporter agent
